title: Astralium Client • WOC
description: Astralium Client • WOC - Includes the necessary utilities to optimize your gaming client.
body:
# Information about Astralium Client (SOPP)
- https://github.com/AstraliumMC/SOPP-Client/blob/main/README.md

# Why Astralium Client (SOPP)
- This client greatly speeds up the rendering and mathematical calculations. Thus, you get excellent performance when playing Minecraft on weak hardware. Read more on our [Github](https://github.com/AstraliumMC/SOPP-Client).


# Credits / Rights 
- Our client does not appropriate other people's/author's rights, we're opensource with the MIT license.
- We use public resources found on the Internet, so we do not violate license agreements.

# Thank you for your attention, AstraliumMC appreciates this <3.
